arts.ttl: Arsenal will face Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals after controversial penalty shootout as little-known rule causes heartbreak for Atletico
arts.sum: Arsenal have learned their fate for the Champions League quarter-final after Real and Atletico Madrid's last-16 tie was thrillingly decided by a penalty shootout on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Champions League quarter-final fixtures and dates in full as Arsenal meet Real Madrid
arts.sum: We are now down to the final eight teams in European football’s elite club competition

arts.ttl: Real Madrid edge through to Champions League quarter-finals via penalty shoot-out
arts.sum: Real Madrid have booked their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after a penalty shoot-out victory over Atletico Madrid at the Metropolitano, with tie ending 2-2 on aggregate after the hosts won 1-0 after 120 minutes. Atleti needed to overcome the one-goal deficit from last week’s first leg to give themselves a chance of progression, […] The post Real Madrid edge through to Champions League quarter-finals via penalty shoot-out appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Real Madrid beat Atletico Madrid on penalties after controversial VAR decision
arts.sum: Conor Gallagher scored after 27 seconds of the second leg at the Wanda Metropolitano to take the score to 2-2 on aggregate, before Vinicius Jr blazer a penalty over the bar in the second half

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Atlético Madrid 1-0 Real Madrid (2-2 aet, 2-4 on penalties)
arts.sum: Real Madrid win on penalties to go through . Atlético Madrid 1-0 Real Madrid (2-2 aet, 2-4 on penalties) .

arts.ttl: 2025 Champions League quarter-finals: matchups, bracket and dates of the matches
arts.sum: On Tuesday, the first four quarter-final spots were snapped up by Barcelona, Bayern Munich, Inter Milan and Paris Saint-Germain, with the Frenchmen delivering the night’s most notable performance by knocking out six-time European Cup winners Liverpool. The final quarter-final berth will be filled by either Atlético Madrid or Real Madrid, whose round-of-16 second leg has headed into extra time.
